scans.name: scan-bronze-silver
scans.description: Scans the bronze (raw NewsAPI JSON) and silver (enriched articles) containers in Azure Blob Storage / ADLS Gen2. Applies PII classification rules and builds lineage from raw ingest to enriched layer.

recurrence.comment: 30 minutes after ADF pipeline completes (ADF runs at 02:00, finishes by 03:00). Silver layer is fully populated by scan time.

scans.name: scan-gold
scans.description: Scans the gold aggregation outputs (sentiment trends, top entities, trending keywords). Lower sensitivity — aggregated data, no individual articles.

scans.name: scan-search-index
scans.description: Scans the Azure AI Search articles index. Builds lineage from silver layer to the Search index. Does not apply PII classification — PII detection is handled at the silver layer, and the Search index does not store hasPii or entity categories.

recurrence.comment: Weekly is sufficient for the Search index — it changes nightly but lineage is stable.

scans.name: scan-audit-table
scans.description: Scans the articleAudit and articleDedup tables in Azure Table Storage. These contain url hashes and event timestamps — low PII risk, but scanned for completeness of the lineage graph.

deploymentNotes.howToRegisterDataSources: Microsoft Purview portal → Data Map → Sources → Register, or via REST API: PUT /datasources/{dataSourceName}
deploymentNotes.howToCreateScans: After registering data sources, create scans via portal → Data Map → Sources → {source} → New Scan, or REST API: PUT /datasources/{dataSourceName}/scans/{scanName}
deploymentNotes.managedIdentity: Grant Purview's managed identity 'Storage Blob Data Reader' on the storage account and 'Search Index Data Reader' on the Search service
deploymentNotes.adfLineage: ADF lineage is auto-detected by Purview when both are in the same subscription. No additional configuration needed for the nightly ADF pipeline.
deploymentNotes.customFunctionLineage: fn-enrich lineage (bronze → silver) is NOT auto-detected. Register manually using scripts/register-purview-lineage.js after deployment.
